description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile white sports car with a streamlined body and aggressive styling, reminiscent of high-performance European coupes. The car features a sharply contoured hood, wide front grille, and angular headlights, giving it a modern and dynamic appearance. Its side profile reveals a two-door coupe design with black accent panels and large, dark alloy wheels, emphasizing its sporty character. The rear is equipped with prominent taillights and dual exhausts, while the roofline slopes smoothly towards the back, enhancing its aerodynamic silhouette. The windows are tinted, and the car sits low to the ground, suggesting high speed and agility. The overall design is both luxurious and performance-oriented, suitable for urban streets or upscale neighborhoods.
description: A white, low-slung sports car with black accents, large alloy wheels, and a streamlined, aerodynamic body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, angular headlights, and contoured hood.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the coupe profile, black side panel, and large wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, dual exhausts, and sloping roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible black accent and aerodynamic lines.
